feature: Provider-Agnostic Enforcement via MCP Tool Guards
description: Move enforcement from Claude Code hooks to MCP tool guards + nexus API middleware. Enables swarm tracking and boundary validation for open models and alternative frontends. ADR-2603221959.

phases.name: IEnforcementPort trait in hex-core
phases.description: Define EnforcementContext, EnforcementResult, and IEnforcementPort trait in hex-core. Implement DefaultEnforcer that checks: agent registered, workplan active, task assigned, file within boundary. Load rules from .hex/adr-rules.toml.

tasks.name: Define enforcement types and port trait
tasks.description: Create hex-core/src/ports/enforcement.rs with EnforcementContext (agent_id, workplan_id, swarm_id, task_id, target_file, operation), EnforcementResult (Allow, Warn, Block), and IEnforcementPort trait with check() method. Add pub mod enforcement to hex-core/src/ports/mod.rs.

tasks.name: Implement DefaultEnforcer
tasks.description: Create hex-core/src/domain/enforcement.rs implementing IEnforcementPort. Rules: (1) spawn_agent with run_in_background requires task_id, (2) edit/write requires workplan_id or non-mandatory mode, (3) target_file must be within workplan boundary if boundary rules loaded. Load enforcement_mode from project config.

phases.name: MCP tool guards
phases.description: Add enforcement checks to hex mcp tool handlers before executing mutating operations.

tasks.name: Add enforcement context to MCP server state
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/mcp.rs, initialize a DefaultEnforcer on MCP server startup. Store enforcement mode and project config. Extract agent_id from MCP session state or X-Hex-Agent-Id header.

tasks.name: Guard mutating MCP tools
tasks.description: Before executing hex_task_create, hex_memory_store, hex_swarm_init, add enforcement check. For tools that edit files (future), check boundary rules. Return error response with blocked=true if enforcement fails. Include enforcement warning in tool output for Warn results.

phases.name: MCP lifecycle tools for open models
phases.description: Add MCP tools that replace Claude Code hooks for session lifecycle management.

tasks.name: Add hex_session_start MCP tool
tasks.description: New MCP tool that registers the agent, loads workplan context, and returns session state. Replaces SessionStart hook for non-Claude providers. Params: project_dir, model_name. Returns: agent_id, workplan_id, active_swarms.

tasks.name: Add hex_session_heartbeat MCP tool
tasks.description: New MCP tool that sends heartbeat and checks inbox. Replaces UserPromptSubmit/route hook. Params: none (uses session agent_id). Returns: inbox notifications if any.

tasks.name: Add hex_workplan_activate MCP tool
tasks.description: New MCP tool to set the active workplan for this session. Replaces route hook workplan loading. Params: workplan_id. Returns: workplan phases and current status.

phases.name: Nexus API enforcement middleware
phases.description: Add axum middleware to hex-nexus that checks enforcement on mutating REST endpoints.

tasks.name: Create enforcement middleware
tasks.description: Add hex-nexus/src/middleware/enforcement.rs. Axum middleware that extracts X-Hex-Agent-Id, X-Hex-Workplan-Id, X-Hex-Task-Id headers. Runs IEnforcementPort::check() for POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE requests. Returns 403 with error JSON if blocked. Skips GET requests and health endpoints.

success_metrics: MCP tools reject mutating operations from unregistered agents
hex_session_start works from any MCP client (not just Claude Code)
Nexus API returns 403 for untracked mutations in mandatory mode
Same enforcement rules apply regardless of LLM provider
hex agent audit shows tracked commits from open-model agents
